label: Profiles
path: Accounts Center > Profiles
description: View and manage all profiles connected to your Accounts Center, including Facebook, Instagram, Threads, and Meta accounts.

label: Connected experiences
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences
description: Manage features that work across your connected accounts, such as cross-posting, profile syncing, and shared shopping activity.

label: Sharing posts, stories or reels
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Sharing posts, stories or reels
description: Share posts, stories or reels across your Instagram and Facebook accounts, and from Instagram/Facebook to Threads.

label: Share WhatsApp Status to Stories
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Share WhatsApp Status to Stories
description: Automatically share your WhatsApp Status to your Facebook or Instagram Stories.

label: Syncing your profile picture
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Syncing your profile picture
description: Sync your profile picture across Facebook, Instagram, Meta Horizon, and Threads profiles.

label: Manage avatars
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Manage avatars
description: View all your avatars in one place and assign the same avatar across multiple profiles.

label: Syncing your shopping activity
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Syncing your shopping activity
description: Sync your shopping activity across Facebook and Instagram, including wishlist and recently viewed items.

label: Connecting Facebook Dating and Instagram
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Connecting Facebook Dating and Instagram
description: Share Instagram posts on your Dating profile and add Instagram followers as secret crushes.

label: Following people on Meta Horizon
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Following people on Meta Horizon
description: Automatically send follow requests to Facebook friends or Instagram follows who have Meta Horizon profiles.

label: Showing your other profiles in Meta Horizon
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Showing your other profiles in Meta Horizon
description: Choose which names or usernames are shown across your profiles in Meta Horizon.

label: Meta Cloud Albums
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Meta Cloud Albums
description: View media captured in Meta Horizon Worlds in your Instagram photo galleries through Meta Cloud Albums.

label: Logging in with accounts
path: Accounts Center > Connected experiences > Logging in with accounts
description: Manage which accounts can log into each other within the same Accounts Center.

label: Accounts
path: Accounts Center > Accounts
description: Add or remove Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Threads, and Meta accounts from your Accounts Center.

label: Add accounts
path: Accounts Center > Accounts > Add accounts
description: Add a new Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Threads, or Meta account to your Accounts Center.

label: Remove accounts
path: Accounts Center > Accounts > Remove accounts
description: Remove an account from your Accounts Center to manage it separately.

label: Personal details
path: Accounts Center > Personal details
description: Update your contact information, birthday, manage identity confirmation, memorialization preferences, and delete or deactivate your account or profile.

label: Contact info
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Contact info
description: Manage your email addresses and phone numbers associated with your accounts.

label: Birthday
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Birthday
description: View or update your birthday across your connected accounts.

label: Identity confirmation
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Identity confirmation
description: Confirm your identity with Meta by submitting identification documents.

label: Memorialization settings
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Account ownership and control > Memorialization
description: Choose a legacy contact or request account deletion after passing. Manage memorialization preferences for your account.

label: Account ownership and control
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Account ownership and control
description: Manage account ownership settings including deactivation, deletion, and memorialization.

label: Deactivate account
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Account ownership and control > Deactivation or deletion > Deactivate account
description: Temporarily deactivate your Facebook, Instagram, or other Meta account.

label: Delete account
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Account ownership and control > Deactivation or deletion > Delete account
description: Permanently delete your Facebook, Instagram, or other Meta account and all associated data.

label: Deactivate or delete profile
path: Accounts Center > Personal details > Account ownership and control > Deactivation or deletion
description: Deactivate or delete individual profiles, including additional Facebook profiles.

label: Password and security
path: Accounts Center > Password and security
description: Manage your password, two-factor authentication, login alerts, login activity, and where you're logged in.

label: Change password
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Change password
description: Change or update the password for your Facebook, Instagram, or Meta account.

label: Passkeys
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Passkeys
description: Set up passkeys to log in using your fingerprint, face recognition, or device password instead of a traditional password.

label: Two-factor authentication
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Two-factor authentication
description: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a code in addition to your password when logging in.

label: Login alerts
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Login alerts
description: Get notified when someone logs into your account from an unrecognized device or browser.

label: Where you're logged in
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Where you're logged in
description: See all active sessions and devices where your account is currently logged in, and log out remotely.

label: Security checkup
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Security checkup
description: Review and improve your account security with personalized recommendations.

label: Saved login info
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Saved login info
description: Manage devices and browsers where your login information is saved for quick access.

label: Emails from Meta
path: Accounts Center > Password and security > Emails from Meta
description: View recent security and login emails sent by Meta to verify their authenticity.

label: Your information and permissions
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions
description: Manage how your information is used, upload contacts, manage search history, and download or transfer your data.

label: Export your information
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Export your information
description: Export a copy of your Facebook or Instagram information to a device or external service.

label: Access your information
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Access your information
description: Access your Activity log, settings, and Privacy Center for each of your profiles.

label: Transfer your information
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Transfer your information
description: Transfer a copy of your information to another service or platform.

label: Manage your information
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Manage your information
description: Control how long Meta retains your information and manage data retention settings.

label: Search history
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Search history
description: Review and manage your search history across Facebook and Instagram.

label: Upload contacts
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Upload contacts
description: Manage whether your phone contacts are continuously uploaded to help find friends and connections.

label: Your activity off Meta technologies
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Your activity off Meta technologies
description: View or clear activity data from businesses and organizations you visit outside of Meta apps and websites.

label: Specific ad partners
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Specific ad partners
description: Manage your activity information sent from specific ad partners and linked external accounts.

label: Manage cookies
path: Accounts Center > Your information and permissions > Manage cookies
description: Manage cookies and similar technologies used to personalize content, ads, and improve your experience.

label: Ad preferences
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences
description: Manage your ad experience including ad topics, interests, profile information used for ads, and recent ad activity.

label: Ad topics
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Ad topics
description: Choose to see fewer ads about certain topics like alcohol, gambling, parenting, or pets.

label: Customize ads
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Customize ads
description: Manage how your interests and profile information are used to personalize the ads you see.

label: Categories used to reach you
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Categories used to reach you
description: View and manage the categories advertisers use to show you ads based on your profile information.

label: Activity information from ad partners
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Activity information from ad partners
description: Control whether Meta uses activity information from ad partners to show you personalized ads.

label: Audience-based advertising
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Audience-based advertising
description: Manage preferences for ads shown to you based on audience lists uploaded by advertisers.

label: Recent ad activity
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Recent ad activity
description: View ads you've recently interacted with across your Facebook and Instagram accounts.

label: Advertisers you've seen recently
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Advertisers you've seen recently
description: View a list of advertisers whose ads you've recently seen and manage your preferences.

label: Ad settings
path: Accounts Center > Ad preferences > Ad settings
description: Manage general ad settings including data used for ads and social interactions in ads.

label: Payments
path: Accounts Center > Payments
description: Manage settings for Meta Pay including payment methods and purchase history.

label: Payment methods
path: Accounts Center > Payments > Payment methods
description: Add, edit, or remove payment methods such as credit cards, debit cards, or PayPal for Meta Pay.

label: Purchase history
path: Accounts Center > Payments > Purchase history
description: View your purchase history and transaction records across Meta platforms.

label: Meta Pay settings
path: Accounts Center > Payments > Meta Pay settings
description: Manage your Meta Pay preferences and settings for payments across Meta platforms.

label: Supervision
path: Accounts Center > Supervision
description: Manage parental supervision settings through Family Center for teen accounts across Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and Meta Horizon.

label: Family Center
path: Accounts Center > Supervision > Family Center
description: Access Family Center to manage supervision settings, screen time limits, and privacy settings for teen accounts.

label: Screen time
path: Accounts Center > Supervision > Screen time
description: Set daily time limits and manage screen time for supervised teen accounts.

label: Content restrictions
path: Accounts Center > Supervision > Content restrictions
description: Manage content sensitivity settings and restrictions for supervised teen accounts.

label: Meta Verified
path: Accounts Center > Meta Verified
description: Subscribe to Meta Verified for a verified badge, enhanced support, and additional features.

label: Meta Verified subscription
path: Accounts Center > Meta Verified > Subscription
description: Manage your Meta Verified subscription, billing, and plan details.

label: Enhanced support
path: Accounts Center > Meta Verified > Enhanced support
description: Access priority customer support available to Meta Verified subscribers.

label: Subscriptions
path: Accounts Center > Subscriptions
description: Manage your active subscriptions across Meta platforms.

label: Manage account
path: Accounts Center > Manage account
description: General account management options including account recovery and account status.

label: Cross-profile experiences
path: Accounts Center > Cross-profile experiences
description: Manage experiences that work across your different profiles and accounts.

label: Login and security
path: Accounts Center > Login and security
description: Manage login methods, security settings, and authentication options for your Meta Account.
